To determine who earns the most after an eight-hour day, convert each person's hourly wage to USD and then calculate their daily earnings:

- **Navin**: \(160 \text{ rupee/hour} \times \frac{1 \text{ USD}}{32.35 \text{ rupee}} \times 8 \text{ hours} = \boxed{39.57 \text{ USD}}\)
- **Luka**: \(25 \text{ kuna/hour} \times \frac{1 \text{ USD}}{5.18 \text{ kuna}} \times 8 \text{ hours} = \boxed{38.61 \text{ USD}}\)
